projects.name: Project Mariner
projects.subtitle: Agentic Browser AI
projects.description: Google DeepMind's autonomous browser agent capable of completing multi-step web tasks. Led full architectural design of the agentic reasoning loop, memory management, and safety guardrails. Deployed to 500M+ Chrome users. Processes 2B+ daily agent actions.

projects.name: Cognix Flow
projects.subtitle: No-Code AI Workflow Engine
projects.description: Enterprise no-code AI workflow automation platform allowing business users to build complex agentic automations without coding. Built with a visual node-based editor, 200+ pre-built integrations, and enterprise-grade security.

projects.name: ChainThink
projects.subtitle: Chain-of-Thought Reasoning Framework
projects.description: Open-source framework for chain-of-thought prompting and structured reasoning in large language models. Provides standardized templates, evaluation benchmarks, and visualization tools. Used by 12,000+ researchers globally. Foundation for the NeurIPS 2022 best-paper nominee.

projects.name: AlignGuard
projects.subtitle: AI Safety Evaluation Suite
projects.description: Comprehensive evaluation framework for measuring alignment, safety, and robustness of large language models. Includes 50+ evaluation categories, automated red-teaming tools, and safety scoring APIs. Adopted by Anthropic, Cohere, and Mistral for internal evaluations.

projects.name: MultiMind
projects.subtitle: Multi-Agent Coordination Protocol
projects.description: Open protocol and reference implementation for coordinating multiple specialized AI agents on long-horizon tasks. Defines standardized message passing, task delegation, and consensus mechanisms. Submitted as RFC to the IETF AI Working Group. 3 Fortune 500 deployments in production.

projects.name: AryanMehta.ai
projects.subtitle: AI Education Platform
projects.description: Personal knowledge platform offering free AI/ML courses, research summaries, and interactive coding labs. Over 280,000 registered learners from 140+ countries. Features interactive Jupyter notebooks, video lectures, and AI-assisted learning paths. Fully free and open access.
